label: Correlation Heatmap
description: Asset correlation matrix heatmap with colour-coded cells, tooltip, and dynamic import for performance.

0.6.note: sub-component (CorrelationHeatmap) renders Skeleton rows during isLoading.

0.7.note: sub-component renders 'No correlation data available' when empty.

0.8.note: — sub-component now checks isError from useCorrelationMatrix and renders error message.

0.9.note: no dead code. Architecture note: widget uses Next.js dynamic import delegating to components/risk/correlation-heatmap.tsx which owns its own useCorrelationMatrix hook — L0 checks satisfied at sub-component level.

l0.notes: 0.1 ✓ WidgetErrorBoundary via widget-wrapper. 0.2 ✓ requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 ✓ availableOn: [risk]. 0.4 ✓ no any/ts-ignore. 0.5 ✓ no lib/mocks import. 0.6 ✓ sub-component (CorrelationHeatmap) renders Skeleton rows during isLoading. 0.7 ✓ sub-component renders 'No correlation data available' when empty. 0.8 FIXED — sub-component now checks isError from useCorrelationMatrix and renders error message. 0.9 ✓ no dead code. Architecture note: widget uses Next.js dynamic import delegating to components/risk/correlation-heatmap.tsx which owns its own useCorrelationMatrix hook — L0 checks satisfied at sub-component level.

1.1.note: CorrelationHeatmap sub-component reads exclusively from useCorrelationMatrix() API hook.

1.3.note: scope.mode fed into query key and API path (withMode helper).

1.4.note: — correlation matrix is portfolio-level, no client-level cascade in this hook.

1.5.note: — no strategy-level filter for correlation matrix.

1.6.note: no filter selection means full matrix returned.

1.7.note: no reference data constants in this widget or sub-component.

l1.notes: 1.1 ✓ CorrelationHeatmap sub-component reads exclusively from useCorrelationMatrix() API hook. 1.2 ✓ useCorrelationMatrix calls useGlobalScope() internally (hooks/api/use-risk.ts line 175). 1.3 ✓ scope.mode fed into query key and API path (withMode helper). 1.4 N/A — correlation matrix is portfolio-level, no client-level cascade in this hook. 1.5 N/A — no strategy-level filter for correlation matrix. 1.6 ✓ no filter selection means full matrix returned. 1.7 ✓ no reference data constants in this widget or sub-component.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

findings: 0.8 fix: components/risk/correlation-heatmap.tsx now reads isError from useCorrelationMatrix and renders 'Failed to load correlation data' error state
